creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the quick update.

It looks like you now have the documentation listed both in PORTDOCS and in pkg-plist.  This will lead to problems during packaging (check with "make check-plist").  I think it suffices to just take out the docs from pkg-plist to fix this.

The order of DISTVERSIONPREFIX and DISTVERSION is wrong too (check with portlint); swapping them fixes the issue.

The last issue I see is that your port bundles all the Dejavu fonts.  We already ship these in x11-fonts/dejavu.  In the interest of not installing duplicated files, please check if you can patch the port to depend on x11-fonts/dejavu and reference these fonts instead of shipping your own.  This'll make the package a lot smaller, too.

I apologise for not raising this issue the first time round.
